# Signed Reviews
> Purchase-verified customer reviews, backed by Stripe.

## About
Signed Reviews is a SaaS platform that cryptographically links customer reviews to completed Stripe transactions. Every review is tamper-evident and provably authentic, eliminating fake reviews by design.

## Key Pages
- /: Homepage — product overview, features, and value proposition
- /pricing/: Pricing plans (free + paid tiers)
- /about/: Company information and mission
- /features/: Full feature list and capabilities
- /how-it-works/: Visual walkthrough of the Stripe verification flow
- /integrations/: Stripe integration and API documentation
- /blog/: Articles on review authenticity, e-commerce trust, and Stripe ecosystem
- /faq/: Frequently asked questions
- /docs/: Developer documentation
- /api/: API reference

## Key Facts
- Every review requires a completed Stripe transaction before submission
- Reviews are cryptographically signed, creating tamper-evident proof
- Platform integrates with Stripe via OAuth — no API keys needed
- Built-in fraud detection, automated review collection, and analytics
- Founded in 2025. Free plan + paid plans from $29/mo.

## Statistics
- 98% of consumers read online reviews before buying (BrightLocal, 2023)
- Displaying verified reviews can increase conversion by up to 270% (Spiegel Research Center)
- Trustpilot removed 2.7 million fake reviews in 2022 (Trustpilot Transparency Report)
